narrative:
Union Township D (precinct in Clermont County) has 926 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.8 percentage points.
